name: DLL Side-Loading via Legitimate Application
description: Detects potential DLL side-loading through unsigned DLLs loaded by signed applications
query:
// Detect signed processes loading unsigned DLLs
// Indicates potential DLL side-loading
events from edr_process
where signature_status = "signed"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)\.dll"
  and exe_path matches "(?i)(\\temp\\|\\appdata\\|\\users\\.*\\downloads\\)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 60 seconds
